{{html clean="false"}}
<div id="qf-panel-container"></div>
<div id="qf-popover" style="display:none;position:absolute;z-index:9999;background:#212529;color:#fff;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 8px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.3);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;" onclick="qfOpenFormWithAnchor()">&#128172; Add Comment</div>
<script>
(function(){
  var path=window.location.pathname;
  var match=path.match(/\/bin\/view\/(.+)/);
  var docRef=match?decodeURIComponent(match[1]).replace(/\/$/,''):'';
  if(!docRef.endsWith('WebHome'))docRef=docRef+'.WebHome';
  docRef=docRef.replace(/\//g,'.');
  var returnUrl=window.location.pathname;

  // Load the sidebar panel
  fetch('/bin/view/QualityFlow/RenderPanel?docRef='+encodeURIComponent(docRef)+'&returnUrl='+encodeURIComponent(returnUrl))
    .then(function(r){return r.text();})
    .then(function(html){
      document.getElementById('qf-panel-container').innerHTML=html;
      injectHighlights();
    });

  // ── POPOVER (only on text selection) ──────────────────────────────
  var popover=document.getElementById('qf-popover');
  var capturedText='';

  document.addEventListener('mouseup',function(e){
    // Don't show popover if clicking inside the sidebar panel
    if(e.target.closest && e.target.closest('#qf-panel-container')) return;
    if(e.target.closest && e.target.closest('#qf-popover')) return;

    setTimeout(function(){
      var sel=window.getSelection();
      var text=sel?sel.toString().trim():'';

      // Only show if real text selection (minimum 3 chars)
      if(text.length<3){
        popover.style.display='none';
        return;
      }

      capturedText=text.substring(0,500);
      var rect=sel.getRangeAt(0).getBoundingClientRect();
      popover.style.top=(window.scrollY+rect.bottom+6)+'px';
      popover.style.left=(window.scrollX+rect.left)+'px';
      popover.style.display='block';
    },10);
  });

  // Hide popover when clicking elsewhere
  document.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){
    if(!popover.contains(e.target)){
      popover.style.display='none';
    }
  });

  // ── OPEN FORM WITH ANCHOR ─────────────────────────────────────────
  window.qfOpenFormWithAnchor=function(){
    popover.style.display='none';
    var form=document.getElementById('qf-add-comment-form');
    if(form) form.style.display='block';

    // Find the anchorText hidden input inside the form
    var ai=form?form.querySelector('input[name="anchorText"]'):null;
    if(ai) ai.value=capturedText;

    // Show anchor preview
    var p=document.getElementById('qf-anchor-preview');
    if(!p && form){
      p=document.createElement('div');
      p.id='qf-anchor-preview';
      p.style.cssText='background:#fff3cd;border:1px solid #ffda6a;border-radius:4px;padding:6px;font-size:11px;margin-bottom:8px;color:#664d03;';
      var formEl=form.querySelector('form');
      if(formEl) formEl.insertBefore(p,formEl.firstChild);
    }
    if(p){
      p.innerHTML='&#128205; Anchored to: <em>"'+capturedText.substring(0,80)+(capturedText.length>80?'...':'')+'"</em>';
      p.style.display='block';
    }
    window.getSelection().removeAllRanges();
  };

  // ── HIGHLIGHT INJECTION ───────────────────────────────────────────
  function injectHighlights(){
    fetch('/bin/view/QualityFlow/RenderHighlights?docRef='+encodeURIComponent(docRef))
      .then(function(r){return r.text();})
      .then(function(json){
        try{
          var comments=JSON.parse(json);
          var area=document.querySelector('#xwikicontent')
                   ||document.querySelector('.xcontent')
                   ||document.querySelector('.wiki-content')
                   ||document.body;

          comments.forEach(function(c){
            if(!c.anchorText||c.anchorText.trim()==='') return;

            // Light yellow background for all, colored border by type
            var bgColor='rgba(255,243,128,.45)';
            var borderColor='#ffc107';

            if(c.status==='Resolved'){
              bgColor='rgba(108,117,125,.1)';
              borderColor='#adb5bd';
            } else if(c.type==='Blocker'){
              borderColor='#dc3545';
            } else if(c.type==='Suggestion'){
              borderColor='#0d6efd';
            }

            wrapText(area,c.anchorText,bgColor,borderColor,c.id);
          });
        }catch(e){
          console.log('QF highlight error:',e);
        }
      })
      .catch(function(e){
        console.log('QF highlight fetch error:',e);
      });
  }

  // ── TEXT WRAPPING ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function wrapText(container,searchText,bgColor,borderColor,commentId){
    // Normalize whitespace in search text for matching
    var normalizedSearch=searchText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();

    var walker=document.createTreeWalker(container,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,null,false);
    var node;
    var textNodes=[];

    // Collect all text nodes
    while((node=walker.nextNode())){
      textNodes.push(node);
    }

    // Try exact match first
    for(var i=0;i<textNodes.length;i++){
      node=textNodes[i];
      var idx=node.nodeValue.indexOf(searchText);
      if(idx===-1){
        // Try normalized match
        idx=node.nodeValue.replace(/\s+/g,' ').indexOf(normalizedSearch);
        if(idx===-1) continue;
      }

      var matchLen=searchText.length;
      var before=node.nodeValue.substring(0,idx);
      var after=node.nodeValue.substring(idx+matchLen);
      var mark=document.createElement('mark');
      mark.style.cssText='background:'+bgColor+';border-bottom:2px solid '+borderColor+';cursor:pointer;border-radius:2px;padding:0 1px;';
      mark.setAttribute('data-comment-id',commentId);
      mark.title='Click to see comment #'+commentId;
      mark.textContent=node.nodeValue.substring(idx,idx+matchLen);
      mark.addEventListener('click',function(){
        var id=this.getAttribute('data-comment-id');
        // Scroll sidebar to the matching comment card
        var card=document.querySelector('[data-qf-card="'+id+'"]');
        if(card){
          card.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'nearest'});
          card.style.boxShadow='0 0 0 3px rgba(13,110,253,.4)';
          setTimeout(function(){card.style.boxShadow='';},2500);
        }
      });

      var parent=node.parentNode;
      if(before) parent.insertBefore(document.createTextNode(before),node);
      parent.insertBefore(mark,node);
      if(after) parent.insertBefore(document.createTextNode(after),node);
      parent.removeChild(node);
      break;
    }
  }
})();
</script>
{{/html}}
